text:
Also this:

ure_bulk_read_callback: bulk read error, USB_ERR_CANCELLED
ue0: link state changed to DOWN
ure_bulk_read_callback: bulk read error, USB_ERR_IOERROR
ue0: link state changed to UP
ure_bulk_read_callback: bulk read error, USB_ERR_CANCELLED
ue0: link state changed to DOWN
ue0: link state changed to UP
ure_bulk_read_callback: bulk read error, USB_ERR_IOERROR
